mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_contract_process WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status=#{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_contract WHERE t_contract.id=t_contract_process.contract_id AND t_contract.delete_flag=0)) AS contract_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_technical_agreement_sub WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status=#{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_technical_agreement WHERE t_technical_agreement.id=t_technical_agreement_sub.technical_agreement_id AND t_technical_agreement.delete_flag=0)) AS technical_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_out_child WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status=#{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_out WHERE t_out.id=t_out_child.out_id AND t_out.delete_flag=0)) AS out_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_please_money_config_sun sun WHERE sun.handle_by = #{loginName} AND sun.status = #{status} AND sun.delete_flag = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_please_money_config_sub sub INNER JOIN t_please_money_config main ON sub.m_id = main.id WHERE sub.id = sun.sub_id AND sub.delete_flag = 0 AND main.delete_flag = 0 )) AS money_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_software_process WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status=#{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_software WHERE t_software.id=t_software_process.software_id AND delete_flag=0)) AS software_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_my_service_sub WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status=#{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_my_service WHERE t_my_service.id=t_my_service_sub.service_id AND delete_flag=0)) AS service_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_hardware_child WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status=#{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_hardware WHERE t_hardware.id=t_hardware_child.hardware_id AND delete_flag=0)) AS hardware_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_expense_claim_sub WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status=#{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_expense_claim WHERE t_expense_claim.id=t_expense_claim_sub.expense_claim_id AND delete_flag=0)) AS claim_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_apply_formal_sub WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status= #{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_apply_formal WHERE t_apply_formal.id=t_apply_formal_sub.apply_formal_id AND delete_flag=0)) AS apply_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_office_supplies_sub WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status= #{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_office_supplies WHERE t_office_supplies.id=t_office_supplies_sub.office_supplies_id AND delete_flag=0)) AS office_supplies_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_service_contract_process WHERE handle_by = #{loginName} AND status= #{status} AND delete_flag=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_service_contract WHERE t_service_contract.id=t_service_contract_process.service_contract_id AND delete_flag=0)) AS service_contract_count

SELECT status, COUNT(1) as count FROM t_project_statis
delete_flag = 0
GROUP BY status
